---
name: Documentation / Question
about: Ask a question or suggest documentation improvements
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation, question
assignees: ''

---

## Question / Documentation Gap

What would you like to know or what documentation is unclear or missing?

## What I've Tried

Have you already checked:
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] ROADMAP.md (in `.claude/`)
- [ ] GitHub Discussions
- [ ] Existing Issues

## Context

What are you trying to accomplish? What context would help answer your question?

## Suggested Documentation

If suggesting a documentation improvement, describe what should be documented and where.

## Additional Resources

Link to any relevant resources, examples, or similar documentation in other projects.
